result.summary:
HTTP path: the V48 host API is a stdlib ThreadingHTTPServer in host/server.py bound to 0.0.0.0:8770 (env V48_HOST_PORT, server.py:47,358). No auth of any kind; CORS is wide open (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *, server.py:203). POST /api/run with {"prompt": str, "asset_id": int|null, "asset_ids": [int]|null, "date_window": {range,start,end,sampling}|null, "history": [{prompt,answer}]|null} is the one submit endpoint (server.py:241-343). Flow inside do_POST: (1) if no asset_id/asset_ids, the knowledge layer runs first — a conceptual/off-scope prompt short-circuits to {ok,prompt,kind:"knowledge",answer,refused} (server.py:316-323); (2) natural_compare_ids(prompt) may auto-promote a fresh "compare A and B" prompt with 2+ confidently-pinned full names to the multi path (server.py:324-333, host/multi_asset.py:17-51); (3) asset_ids with 2+ entries (and DB knob multi_asset.enabled, default true) → build_response_multi (server.py:306-308,334-336), else build_response(prompt, asset_id, date_window) (server.py:338). Every /api/run response is dumped to outputs/logs/response_<run_id>.json BEFORE being sent (server.py:181-192,339) so a client timeout never loses the payload. Asset pinning: request field "asset_id" (a single mfm_id from lt_mfm) flows run_pipeline→run_1b(prompt, asset_id) and is pinned deterministically as how='user-choice' via layer1b/resolve/pinned_skip.py (skips AI resolution entirely, but still runs the no_data gate). The PIPELINE_ASSET_ID env var is only honored when V48_ALLOW_ENV_PIN=1 (CLI/trace runs; layer1b/build.py:14-15) — a harness calling HTTP must use the asset_id JSON field. Homonym round-trip: when 1b is ambiguous the response comes back 200 with ok:true, asset_pending:true, cards:[] (assemble_cards returns [] when no resolved asset table — host/assemble.py:27-30), and asset.candidates = [{mfm_id,name,class,load_group,has_data}] (layer1b/resolve/candidate_list.py:8-10); the client re-POSTs the SAME prompt with asset_id=<chosen mfm_id> (1 pick) or asset_ids=[id1,id2,...] (2+ picks → multi-asset compare, capped by DB knob multi_asset.max_assets default 6). asset_no_data:true means the asset resolved but its table is empty (Layer 2 still emits the per-leaf-null skeleton); validation_blocked:true means the page can't render for that asset; data_unavailable:true + degrade{kind,layer,detail,reason} is the infra-outage (:5433 tunnel down) honest terminal. GET /api/health → {ok,sb_base}; GET /api/assets?q=<substr> → {ok,assets:[picker-shape rows]} (full registry for the picker's browse state); GET /api/site → {ok,site,live} (live = real SELECT 1 probe of the neuract DATA_DB). POST /api/frame re-fills ONE card for a new date window: request {exact_metadata (or payload), data_instructions, date_window, refetch:{render_card_id,asset_table,asset_name,member_scope,_default_payload}} (the card's own `refetch` bundle served on is_history cards), response {ok,why:"ok",endpoint,payload} (server.py:252-294).

Programmatic path: run.harness.run_pipeline(prompt, *, asset_id=None, db=None, run_id=None, layer1a=None) -> dict is the full pipeline pass (run/harness.py:184-326). It fires run_1a ∥ run_1b via run_parallel, applies the degrade gate, granularity reconcile, run_validate, preflight reroute, the asset gate, then the Layer-2 reflect loop (_reflect_loop → run.layer2_all.run_2_all(run_id, l1a, l1b) -> {card_id: Layer2CardOutput}, run/layer2_all.py:34-74; ONE re-route max, _MAX_ATTEMPTS=2). Its return dict keys: {prompt, run_id, asset_id, layer1a, layer1b, validation, layer2, window, notes:{loop1,loop2}, errors, asset_pending, asset_no_data, validation_blocked, data_unavailable, degrade}. Note run_pipeline stops at Layer 2 — the per-card DATA fill happens at the host: host.assemble.assemble_cards(out, asset, date_window) -> [FE card dict] runs the parallel ems_exec.run_card executor fan-out (host/exec_cards._run_cards, wall-clock budget cfg ems_exec.card_budget_s / env V48_EXEC_BUDGET_S default 45s) and enriches via host.enrich._enrich_card. host.server.build_response(prompt, asset_id=None, date_window=None) -> dict (server.py:100-178) is the complete programmatic equivalent of POST /api/run for one asset; host.multi_asset.build_response_multi(prompt, asset_ids, date_window=None) for compare (which calls run.harness.run_pipeline_multi(prompt, assets, *, db=None) -> {layer1a, run_id, groups:[{class,lane,assets}]}, harness.py:329-352 — 1a routed once, Layer 2 authored once per class, recipe rebound per asset via host/rebind_consumer). Env toggles: V48_SKIP_LAYER2=1 (harness.py:303), V48_ALLOW_ENV_PIN=1 + PIPELINE_ASSET_ID. Existing programmatic example: tools/asset_sweep.py:49 calls run_pipeline(prompt, asset_id=<mfm_id>) directly.

Run artifacts: run_id = "r_" + sha1(salt+"|"+prompt).hexdigest()[:10] (run/run_id.py:5-7) — DETERMINISTIC per prompt (same prompt ⇒ same run_id; reflect loop 2 uses salt="loop2", multi-asset lanes salt="class:<class>", multi run_id is the unsalted prompt hash). Per run, on disk under pipeline_v48/outputs/: logs/response_<run_id>.json (the full HTTP response), logs/pipeline_<run_id>.jsonl (stage-by-stage replayable log, obs/stage.py:11-20), logs/ai_<run_id>.jsonl (every vLLM :8200 call, obs/ai_log.py), logs/failures_<run_id>.jsonl (obs/failures.py:15), notes/<run_id>.json (reflect loop1/loop2 notes, obs/notes.py). Per-card response shape (host/enrich.py:201-246 + _attach_l2_notes server.py:50-68): {card_id, render_card_id, title, story, role, slot, size, payload (the COMPLETED CMD_V2 payload — the FE renders it as direct props; null only if no skeleton exists), endpoint, is_history, refetch (only on is_history cards), swap, conforms, fill_source:"ems_exec", fill_ok, fill_why, data_instructions, validation, has_payload, payload_error, data_note, l2_answerability, render:{verdict:"render"|"partial"|"honest_blank", answerability:"full"|"partial"|"none", reason, coverage_note, date_control:"enabled"|"disabled", slots:null, gaps:[{slot,cause,metric,reason}]|null, leaf_stats:{real,data,undeclared}, watermark:"live"}, frame_status:{endpoint,ok,why}}; multi-asset cards additionally carry asset:{id,name,class} and the top-level response has multi_asset:true + assets:[{mfm_id,name,class,table}]. Top-level single response keys (verified against a real dump): ok, prompt, run_id, elapsed_ms, sb_base, page{page_key,page_title,shell,metric,intent,story,layout,groups}, asset_pending, asset_no_data, validation_blocked, data_unavailable, degrade, asset{asset,how,candidates,n_columns}, validation{verdict,how,policy,data_summary,payload_summary}, cards[], frames{} (always empty, back-compat), frame_status{} (empty), live_frame:null, date_window, notes{loop1,loop2}, errors{}.

Server lifecycle: NO systemd unit for the host — it is a plain foreground python process launched as `cd pipeline_v48 && python3 host/server.py` (it fixes sys.path itself, server.py:32-34; binds 0.0.0.0:8770, request_queue_size=128, daemon threads, allow_reuse_address). Currently running (pid on :8770 confirmed via ss). The canonical restart recipe used by the repo's own workflow scripts: kill every host/server.py pid, then `cd pipeline_v48 && PYTHONPATH=. PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 nohup python3 host/server.py > outputs/replay_host.log 2>&1 &` and poll /api/health (scripts/wf_fast_loop_round.js:50). tools/stack_monitor.sh is a detached keep-alive that restarts host :8770 / frontend :5188 / ems_backend :8890 if their port goes dark (logs to outputs/logs/host_stdout.log etc.; stop with `touch /tmp/stack_monitor.stop`). The only systemd units involved are dependencies: db-tunnel.service (ops/db-tunnel.service — ssh -L 127.0.0.1:5433:127.0.0.1:5432 to 10.90.200.91, Restart=always; the live neuract DB the executor reads) and vllm.service (:8200, the pipeline LLM). The Vite frontend (host/web, port 5188) proxies /api → http://localhost:8770 (host/web/vite.config.ts:6; override with V48_HOST_API). Other env: STORYBOOK_URL (default http://100.90.185.31:6008, echoed as sb_base).

key_files.purpose: THE HTTP surface. PORT=8770 env V48_HOST_PORT (:47), main/_Server (:346-364). GET /api/health (:216-217), GET /api/assets?q= (:221-228), GET /api/site (:231-238). POST /api/frame per-card date re-fetch (:252-294, response {ok,why,endpoint,payload}). POST /api/run (:296-343): prompt required (:299-301), asset_id (:302), asset_ids→multi gate (:306-308), date_window (:309), history (:310), knowledge short-circuit (:316-323), natural-compare promotion (:324-333), build_response single path (:100-178 — the full response dict), _dump_response→outputs/logs/response_<run_id>.json (:181-192), _attach_l2_notes adds data_note+l2_answerability per card (:50-68).

Programmatic orchestrator. run_pipeline(prompt, *, asset_id=None, db=None, run_id=None, layer1a=None)->dict (:184-326); reflect loop _MAX_ATTEMPTS=2 (:27, :88-181); asset gate — asset_resolved iff how in {AI,user-choice,no_data,collision_gate_fullname} (:288-291); V48_SKIP_LAYER2 (:303); run_pipeline_multi(prompt, assets, *, db=None)->{layer1a,run_id,groups:[{class,lane,assets}]} (:329-352).

run_2_all(run_id, l1a, l1b)->{card_id: Layer2CardOutput} — the per-card L2 emit fan-out, concurrency capped by DB knob layer2.emit_concurrency default 4 (:34-74); per-card exception envelope _err (:17-19).
make_run_id(prompt, salt='') = 'r_' + sha1(salt+'|'+prompt)[:10] — deterministic per prompt (:5-7).

Multi-asset compare: natural_compare_ids(prompt)->[mfm_id] fail-open (:17-51); build_response_multi(prompt, asset_ids, date_window=None) — resolve ids, run_pipeline_multi, rebind recipe per asset, tag cards with asset:{id,name,class}, response adds multi_asset:true + assets[] (:54-130); cap = DB knob multi_asset.max_assets default 6 (:60).
assemble_cards(out, asset, date_window=None)->[FE card] — the ONE data-fill+enrich seam shared by single and multi paths; returns [] when data_unavailable or no asset table (:12-40).

_enrich_card builds the served card dict — full field list at :201-246 (card_id, render_card_id, payload, refetch, render:{verdict,answerability,reason,gaps,leaf_stats,watermark,date_control}, frame_status, payload_error, has_payload, ...).

Parallel per-card ems_exec.run_card fan-out; wall-clock budget cfg('ems_exec.card_budget_s', env V48_EXEC_BUDGET_S default 45) (:19); _date_window_for resolves range-only presets (:22-38); special handling classes asset_3d/topology_sld/narrative_ai/panel_aggregate via run_special (:71-...).
run_1b(prompt, asset_id=None); PIPELINE_ASSET_ID env fallback ONLY when V48_ALLOW_ENV_PIN=1 (:14-15) — HTTP callers must use the asset_id field.
pinned_skip(asset_id_override, by_id) — deterministic user-choice pin for a picker re-POST; unknown id → falls through to AI resolve; empty asset → no_data outcome (:12-22).
Picker shape {mfm_id,name,class,load_group,has_data}: for_picker (ambiguous candidates in response.asset.candidates) + registry_for_picker (GET /api/assets) (:8-22).
Reference client: POST /api/run body {prompt, asset_id, asset_ids, date_window, history} — array→asset_ids, single→asset_id (:3-10); /api/frame body includes date_window (:29).
Per-run stage log → stderr + outputs/logs/pipeline_<run_id>.jsonl (:11-20).
Every vLLM :8200 call logged to outputs/logs/ai_<run_id>.jsonl (urlopen monkeypatch).
Reflect notes persisted to outputs/notes/<run_id>.json ({loop1:[{card_id,title,answerability,note}], loop2:str|null}).
Keep-alive: restarts host :8770 (`setsid python3 host/server.py > outputs/logs/host_stdout.log`), FE :5188, ems :8890; stop via /tmp/stack_monitor.stop (:15-17,:22-26).

Canonical restart recipe (line 50): kill host/server.py pids, then `cd pipeline_v48 && PYTHONPATH=. PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 nohup python3 host/server.py > outputs/replay_host.log 2>&1 &`, poll /api/health.
systemd unit (installed + active) for the :5433→10.90.200.91:5432 neuract DB tunnel the executor depends on; install = cp to /etc/systemd/system + daemon-reload + restart.
Working programmatic example: run_pipeline(prompt, asset_id=<mfm_id>) per prompt (:13,:49); needs :5433 + :8200 up.

GET /api/assets?q=<substr>.response: {ok: true, assets: [{mfm_id, name, class, load_group, has_data}]}

GET /api/site.response: {ok: true, site: str, live: bool}  # live = SELECT 1 probe of neuract DATA_DB

POST /api/run.request: {prompt: str (required), asset_id: int|str|null, asset_ids: [int]|null, date_window: {range: str, start: iso, end: iso, sampling: str}|null, history: [{prompt, answer}]|null}
POST /api/run.response_single: {ok, prompt, run_id, elapsed_ms, sb_base, page:{page_key,page_title,shell,metric,intent,story,layout,groups}, asset_pending, asset_no_data, validation_blocked, data_unavailable, degrade:{kind,layer,detail,reason}|null, asset:{asset:{mfm_id,name,class,table,...}|null, how, candidates:[picker rows], n_columns}, validation:{verdict,how,policy,data_summary,payload_summary}, cards:[card], frames:{} (always empty), frame_status:{} (empty), live_frame:null, date_window, notes:{loop1:[...],loop2:str|null}, errors:{}}
POST /api/run.response_multi_extra: multi_asset: true, assets: [{mfm_id,name,class,table}], asset_pending/asset_no_data/validation_blocked always false, each card carries asset:{id,name,class}
POST /api/run.response_knowledge: {ok: true, prompt, kind: 'knowledge', answer: str, refused: bool}  # no run_id, no cards; only reachable when asset_id AND asset_ids absent

POST /api/frame.request: {exact_metadata: card.payload (or 'payload'), data_instructions: card.data_instructions, date_window: {range,start,end,sampling}, refetch: {render_card_id, asset_table, asset_name, member_scope, _default_payload}}  # take refetch verbatim from the served card (only present on is_history cards); legacy top-level asset_table/card_id also accepted
POST /api/frame.response: {ok: true, why: 'ok', endpoint: str, payload: <re-filled CMD_V2 payload>}

details.picker_roundtrip: POST /api/run {prompt} -> if 1b ambiguous: 200 {ok:true, asset_pending:true, cards:[], asset:{candidates:[{mfm_id,name,class,load_group,has_data}]}} (Layer 2 NOT run). Re-POST the SAME prompt with asset_id=<mfm_id> to pin (how='user-choice'; knowledge layer skipped), or asset_ids=[id,...] (>=2) for compare. asset_no_data:true = resolved but table empty (cards ARE served as per-leaf-null skeletons; FE opens picker greyed). validation_blocked:true = picker with 'cannot render this page'.

asset_pinning.env: PIPELINE_ASSET_ID honored ONLY when V48_ALLOW_ENV_PIN=1 (layer1b/build.py:14-15) — for CLI/programmatic runs, never the long-running host

multi_asset.submit: asset_ids: [mfm_id, mfm_id, ...] (>=2) in POST /api/run; OR a natural 'compare <full-name-A> and <full-name-B>' prompt (auto-detected, all names must pin confidently)
multi_asset.semantics: 1a routes ONCE, L2 authors once per asset class, executor fills per asset; cards concatenated, grouped by card.asset

programmatic.full_pass_with_cards: host.server.build_response(prompt, asset_id=None, date_window=None) -> the exact /api/run response dict (single asset)
programmatic.multi: host.multi_asset.build_response_multi(prompt, asset_ids, date_window=None) -> the multi response dict; run.harness.run_pipeline_multi(prompt, assets, *, db=None) -> {layer1a, run_id, groups:[{class, lane, assets}]}
programmatic.invoke_from: cd pipeline_v48; python3 -c 'from run.harness import run_pipeline; ...' (host/server.py inserts repo root into sys.path itself; scripts use PYTHONPATH=.)

details.run_id: r_<sha1(salt+'|'+prompt)[:10]> — DETERMINISTIC: same prompt = same run_id (a repeated test prompt overwrites the same response_/pipeline_/ai_ files); salts: 'loop2' (reflect re-route), 'class:<class>' (multi lanes)
run_artifacts: outputs/logs/response_<run_id>.json (full /api/run response, written before wire send; 'response_default.json' for knowledge/no-run_id)
card_fields: payload (completed CMD_V2 payload = FE props; skeleton when L2 skipped; null only if no skeleton)
refetch (is_history cards only: {render_card_id, asset_table, asset_name, member_scope, _default_payload})

render {verdict: render|partial|honest_blank, answerability: full|partial|none, reason, coverage_note:null, date_control: enabled|disabled, slots:null, gaps:[{slot,cause,metric,reason}]|null, leaf_stats:{real,data,undeclared}, watermark:'live'}

server_lifecycle.start: cd /home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48 && python3 host/server.py  (or: PYTHONPATH=. PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 nohup python3 host/server.py > outputs/replay_host.log 2>&1 &)
server_lifecycle.restart: kill existing host/server.py pid(s) then relaunch; allow_reuse_address avoids TIME_WAIT bind failure; poll GET /api/health
server_lifecycle.systemd: NONE for the host itself; dependencies: db-tunnel.service (:5433 neuract, active) and vllm.service (:8200 Qwen)
server_lifecycle.keepalive: tools/stack_monitor.sh (detached loop, restarts host/fe/ems if port dark; stop: touch /tmp/stack_monitor.stop)
server_lifecycle.currently_running: yes — python3 pid on 0.0.0.0:8770 and vite on 0.0.0.0:5188 (verified via ss)

env_vars.PIPELINE_ASSET_ID: mfm_id env pin (CLI only, needs V48_ALLOW_ENV_PIN=1)

external_deps.neuract_db: :5433 via db-tunnel.service (executor reads; down => data_unavailable:true terminal)

details.date_window_shape: {range: 'today'|'yesterday'|'last-7-days'|... , start: ISO8601|null, end: ISO8601|null, sampling: 'minute'|'hourly'|'day'|'week'} — range-only presets are resolved server-side; omit/null => prompt-derived preset (1a time phrase) or today/latest

gotchas: run_id is DETERMINISTIC from the prompt (sha1 prefix) — re-firing the same prompt overwrites outputs/logs/{response_,pipeline_,ai_}r_XXXX files and returns the same run_id; salt only changes for reflect loop2 and multi-asset class lanes. A test harness must vary the prompt text (or read files immediately) to keep runs distinct.
PIPELINE_ASSET_ID env is IGNORED by the HTTP host unless V48_ALLOW_ENV_PIN=1 (layer1b/build.py:14) — over HTTP, pinning is ONLY the asset_id / asset_ids JSON fields.

An ambiguous-asset response is HTTP 200 with ok:true, asset_pending:true and cards:[] — do not treat empty cards as failure; re-submit with asset_id from asset.candidates[].mfm_id. Similarly data_unavailable:true is a 200 'honest terminal' with cards:[].

The knowledge layer runs ONLY when both asset_id and asset_ids are absent — a knowledge/off-scope prompt returns {kind:'knowledge'} with NO cards and NO run_id (its dump lands in response_default.json); a pinned re-POST always goes to the card pipeline.
response.frames, frame_status, live_frame are permanently EMPTY back-compat fields — all data rides on each card's `payload`.
Server persists the response to disk BEFORE sending (server.py:339) — on client timeout read outputs/logs/response_<run_id>.json instead of retrying (a retry re-runs the LLM pipeline).

/api/run can take minutes (N parallel ~22K-token L2 emits + executor fill); L2 concurrency is capped at 4 (layer2.emit_concurrency) and the emit timeout is 150s with NO retry; keep harness page-level concurrency <=2-3 or emits false-timeout under vLLM contention (memory: v48-l2-fanout-concurrency-cap).
No auth anywhere on :8770 and CORS is *; the server is plain HTTP/1.1 stdlib (Content-Length required on POST bodies; keep-alive supported).

result.summary:
V48 connects to TWO Postgres endpoints through ONE wiring module, config/databases.py ("THE SINGLE PLACE for DB wiring — nothing else hard-codes a host/port/db/schema"). The live logging DB is target_version1, schema neuract, reached over the archbox SSH tunnel at 127.0.0.1:5433 (PG_HOST/PG_PORT/PG_DB/PG_SCHEMA/PG_USER/PG_PASSWORD env vars, defaults 127.0.0.1/5433/target_version1/neuract/postgres/empty-password, databases.py:10-15). The catalog DB cmd_catalog is LOCAL Postgres 127.0.0.1:5432 (CATALOG_HOST/CATALOG_PORT env, databases.py:68-69; CMD_CATALOG_DB env -> "cmd_catalog", line 46). Routing is per-database: conn_env(db) (databases.py:73) returns PGHOST/PGPORT/PGUSER/PGPASSWORD + PGCONNECT_TIMEOUT=5 (env PG_CONNECT_TIMEOUT), picking the tunnel for _TUNNEL_DBS = {target_version1, meta_data_version1, target_version1_meta} (line 70) and the local endpoint for everything else. A new module should reuse: data/db_client.py q(db, sql) (line 11 — subprocess `psql --csv`, raises RuntimeError on non-zero, never silently empty) or pg_connect(db) (line 24 — routed psycopg2 connection for cursor/pandas use). For neuract METADATA reads use registries/neuract/_db.py rows(sql, params=None)/dicts(...)/one(...) (lines 50/68/87 — pooled, read-only, returns [] on any failure); for gic_* TIME-SERIES use ems_exec/data/neuract.py (latest/window/series/bucketed..., lines 145+). Both neuract doors take their DSN from config/neuract_dsn.py, itself cfg()-knob-driven (neuract.host/port/db/schema/user/password app_config keys, code-default = databases.py constants); dsn() (line 52) yields the user-locked target postgresql://postgres@127.0.0.1:5433/target_version1?options=-csearch_path%3Dneuract.

The knob system is config/app_config.py cfg(key, default) (line 42): _load() (line 18, @lru_cache(maxsize=1)) reads `SELECT key, value, data_type FROM app_config` on cmd_catalog once per process; _cast() converts by declared data_type (number/int/bool/json, else text); a missing key or ANY DB error falls back to the caller's default (fail-open, never raises, never blocks import). reload() (line 51) clears the process cache after seeding. New knobs are seeded via db/seed_<topic>.sql files: idempotent `INSERT INTO app_config (key, value, data_type, section[, note]) VALUES (...) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value=EXCLUDED.value...`, each with a header comment stating WHY + "Idempotent. Run: psql -h localhost -p 5432 -d cmd_catalog -f db/seed_*.sql" (see db/seed_cache_ttl.sql, db/seed_llm_emit_timeout.sql). The db/ dir (84 files) also holds fix_*.sql (data repairs), *_schema.sql (DDL), and Python appliers exist in tools/ (tools/seed_quantity_vocab.py regenerates quantity.* app_config rows from code defaults via pg_connect — because cfg() REPLACES, it does not merge). app_config columns: key, value, data_type, section, note, updated_at.

data/ttl_cache.py defines TTLCache(dict) (line 31): a byte-for-byte drop-in for a plain {} whose `k in cache` turns False once an entry is older than the TTL; __setitem__ restamps; no deletion on expiry (avoids check-then-get KeyError under the threading server); TTL = cfg('cache.resolution_ttl_s', 120) read lazily + fail-open (lines 19-28). It bounds the lifetime of every per-process resolution cache riding the flaky :5433 tunnel so a flap self-heals within the TTL. The complementary never-cache-empty pattern: data/lt_panels/panel_members.py returns an orphan result WITHOUT caching when the first edge read is empty (lines 61-67) and caches ONLY a non-empty members resolution (lines 117-122); data/equipment/db.py never caches a failed read (returns {} for THIS call, retries next call, lines 32-51). TTLCache sites: data/registry/lt_mfm.py:33 (_CACHE for _home decision + rows/edges), data/lt_panels/panel_members.py:34 (_MEMBERS_CACHE), layer1b/resolve/has_data.py:16-17 (_CACHE/_VAL_CACHE).

CONNECTIVITY NOW (verified 2026-07-12 from this machine): pg_isready reports BOTH endpoints accepting connections — 127.0.0.1:5432 (local) and 127.0.0.1:5433 (tunnel). Working DSNs verified by live read-only queries: `postgresql://postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/cmd_catalog` -> card_handling=145 rows, app_config=309 rows, card_payloads=155 rows, registry_lt_mfm=320 rows, 53 public tables + 22 equipment-schema tables, zero views (page_catalog_cards is a v47-only view; v48 Python never references it — v48 uses the page_layout_cards TABLE). `postgresql://postgres@127.0.0.1:5433/target_version1?options=-csearch_path%3Dneuract` -> 373 tables in schema neuract, 302 gic_* time-series tables, lt_mfm=320, lt_mfm_outgoing=93 edges, device_mappings=22306.

cfg() REPLACES, it does not merge: a DB app_config row fully overrides the code-default dict, so JSON-vocab knobs must be re-seeded whenever the code default changes (tools/seed_quantity_vocab.py exists exactly for this drift)
cfg() is process-cached via lru_cache(1): after seeding/editing app_config in a running process you must call config.app_config.reload(); long-running servers otherwise only see new knobs on restart
page_catalog_cards is a v47 artifact — it does NOT exist in v48 (no Python reference, no view in the live cmd_catalog); v48 uses the page_layout_cards table

neuract gic_* timestamps are ISO-8601 TEXT, not timestamptz — every time comparison needs the ::timestamptz cast (DATA_TS_CAST / neuract_dsn.ts_cast()); the ts column is timestamp_utc, NOT ts

Never cache an empty resolution from a tunneled read: a :5433 flap once poisoned panel_aggregate cards blank for the whole 8h process life; the fix is never-cache-empty + TTLCache, and new cache sites must follow both patterns
PGCONNECT_TIMEOUT only bounds the CONNECT phase; query runtime is unlimited — a reachable-but-slow tunnel can still stall long queries
q() runs psql as a subprocess and returns all-text CSV rows; '' vs None must be normalized by callers (see data/equipment/db.py), and booleans arrive as 't'/'f' strings (see lt_mfm.py _bool)

The registry mirror decision (_home() in data/registry/lt_mfm.py) is itself TTL-cached — if you drop/rebuild registry_* tables the routing self-corrects only after cache.resolution_ttl_s (120s) or a restart
Both DBs are reachable right now, but memory notes the :5433 tunnel is historically flaky (ExitOnForwardFailure fix) — treat tunnel reachability as transient, not guaranteed

V48 already has three tiers of prompt-testing infrastructure. Tier 1 — live fire harnesses that POST prompts to the host (:8770 /api/run): tools/cert_fire18.sh (18 pages, waves of 3 background curls, dumps /tmp/cert18/cert_<nn>.json + routed/timing TSV), tools/campaign_fire_extras.sh (cross-class/multi-asset/knowledge families, sequential, /tmp/campaign/*.json + manifest.tsv), the scratchpad deep-sweep harness (deep_sweep.py/deep_sweep2.py — NOT in repo, lives in a v47-session scratchpad; 20/32 prompts, ThreadPoolExecutor max_workers=2, per-leaf seed-diff REAL/EMPTY + RENDERS_BUT_NO_DATA flag), and tools/asset_sweep.py (9 pinned prompts, in-process run_pipeline, cross-quantity proxy-leak audit). Tier 2 — offline replay/AB tools over logged corpora: tools/morphmap_live_ab.py (diffs two saved response dumps of the same prompts: leaf_stats real counts, payload byte-equality, hardcoded fabrication SEED scan), tools/morphmap_ab.py, tools/wall_corpus_replay.py (replays every logged L2 emit through the current gates, false-positive suspects, committed baseline diff = the acceptance harness for wall changes), tools/replay_item17_guided_asset_resolve.py. Tier 3 — agent-workflow sweeps: scripts/wf_18card_fullsweep_logged.js, wf_cert_verify18.js (SSR + fab-scan audit of the cert dumps), wf_fast_loop_round.js/wf_batch12_layer2.js (fix→verify→recheck loop with the structured residual schema {page, card_id, issue, layer, log_evidence}).

Crucially, a NEW framework skeleton was already started TODAY (2026-07-12) at validation/ — __init__.py declares the full plan (runner, checks/expectations, checks/datesync, checks/determinism, coverage, failures, metrics, report_json/html, replay, cli) but only config.py (per-lane concurrency: run lane default 2 / max 3 vs frame lane 8, auto-throttle on rolling error rate), response.py (the ONE /api/run parser encoding every field gotcha + a 7-value outcome vocabulary: refused/knowledge/compare/cards/picker/unavailable/empty), and corpus/ (universe.py from cmd_catalog, templates.py taxonomy, generate.py deterministic seed=48 JSONL generator, mutate.py alias mutators) exist so far. Any new prompt-testing framework should almost certainly complete THIS package rather than start fresh.

Per-leaf REAL/EMPTY logic exists in two forms: the production render verdict validate/render_verdict.py (compute() at :232 — declared fields + roster_stats + undeclared numeric leaves; blank = None/'—'/''; verdict render/partial/honest_blank; scaffold/time-axis exclusion; narrative and asset_3d special cases) backed by validate/leaf_classify.py (type-only DATA/METADATA split, full-string numeric regex at :87, vocab-driven chrome exemptions); and the seed-diff harness form in the scratchpad deep_sweep.py (is_real(), placeholder detection 0/0.0/null/''/'-'/'—', seed_list_is_data strings=chrome, RENDERS_BUT_NO_DATA = verdict∈(render,partial) AND 0 real leaves). The memory doc warns the seed-diff over-flags (card_payloads has multiple rows per card_id; the fix TODO is matching by (card_id, render_card_id)) and prescribes the nonzero-number regex `:\s*-?\d+\.\d+` (>=3 hits = real) as the verification pass — that regex exists only in the memory doc, not committed code. SSR render checks: host/web/scripts/ssr_repro.tsx (debug, per-card THROWS/NULL/rendered-OK + SSR_GREP markup check), ssr_gate.mjs (standing pass/fail gate over globs, exit 1 on any throwing or NULL-with-payload card), client_repro.tsx (jsdom client-mode with effects — catches chart-draw/NaN-SVG crashes SSR misses, `npm run client-gate`), datesync_repro.tsx (date-sync propagation contract). gotchas: The new framework home already exists: validation/ was scaffolded TODAY (2026-07-12) with config/response/corpus done and runner/checks/coverage/reports/replay/cli still missing — build there, do not create a parallel package (and do not confuse it with the older validate/ package, which is the in-pipeline pre-Layer-2 validation pass, a different concern).

Concurrency is the one hard operational constraint: >2-3 concurrent /api/run calls CONTEND on the single vLLM and manufacture fake 'llm timeout' failures (certified 2026-07-06). Every existing harness respects this (cert_fire18 waves of 3, deep_sweep max_workers=2, validation/config.py RUN_CONCURRENCY_MAX=3). /api/frame is no-LLM and tolerates ~8.

render.verdict is OPTIMISTIC — it is NOT a has-data signal; a verdict='render' card can ship an empty chart (Event-Timeline defect class). Per-leaf truth is render.leaf_stats {real,data}; any new checker must judge leaves, not verdict counts.

The deep-sweep seed-diff OVER-FLAGS: card_payloads has multiple rows per card_id (variants/subcards) and the seeds.json dump keeps only one, plus filled payloads nest differently than seeds — verify every RENDERS_BUT_NO_DATA with the nonzero-number regex (`:\s*-?\d+\.\d+`, >=3 = real); the proper fix is matching seed by (card_id, render_card_id).
Picker candidates live at asset.candidates, NOT top-level candidates — the #1 false-FAIL in early sweeps (encoded in validation/response.py:28).

Never echo raw neuract asset names to stdout — they can carry UTF-8 surrogates that kill an agent/harness; always ascii-encode (validation/response.py ascii_safe; wf scripts mandate open(..., errors='replace')).
Disk is the source of truth for live sweeps: the host persists every response to outputs/logs/response_<run_id>.json, so a curl/client timeout is harmless — read the dump, don't re-fire.

Honest-blank with a per-leaf reason is a PASS (telemetry), not a defect — the wf audit contracts and test_render_guarantee_50 all encode this; a naive 'card has no data = fail' checker will mass-false-fail.
morphmap_live_ab.py does not fire prompts itself — it only diffs two already-captured response dump sets; pair it with a fire script.

test_render_guarantee_50.py's preflight distinguishes reachable-but-wrong-schema DB (hard FAIL, would fake-green) from genuinely unreachable tunnel (loud SKIP) — copy this policy so infra outages never read as code failures.

The pytest suite has no shared fake-LLM fixture to import — mocking is per-module patch.object(mod, 'call_qwen', ...); conftest's autouse cache-clear fixture is what keeps config-monkeypatching tests order-independent.

tests/conftest.py pins the layer2 package in sys.modules because backend/layer2/ shadows pipeline_v48/layer2 — any new test entrypoint outside pytest needs the same pin or PYTHONPATH=pipeline_v48-root.

result.summary:
V48 pipeline stages (single-asset /api/run path, in execution order): (0) HTTP entry host/server.py do_POST /api/run (:241) -> build_response (:100), with an optional knowledge-layer detour (:316-323) and multi-asset lane host/multi_asset.build_response_multi (:334-338). (1) run/harness.py run_pipeline (:184) logs stage PROMPT (:188) then fires Layer 1a (layer1a/build.run_1a - page routing; LLM stages 'route' layer1a/route.py:96 and 'stories' layer1a/story_builder.py:37) IN PARALLEL with Layer 1b (layer1b/build.run_1b - asset resolve + column basket; LLM stages 'asset_resolve' layer1b/resolve/asset_resolve.py:157, 'basket' layer1b/basket/column_basket.py:68). (2) degrade gate run/degrade_gate.apply (harness:220-223,256-258) -> stage 'degrade' kind=data_unavailable on infra outage. (3) granularity reconcile run/reconcile_granularity.apply (harness:247-249). (4) pre-L2 validate validate/build.run_validate via harness._validate (:37-47) -> stage 'validate' with verdict (pass|warn|pass_with_gaps|fail|asset_pending, validate/report.py:12-31) + expected_gap_frac. (5) preflight reroute harness._preflight_reroute (:50-85). (6) asset gate (harness:288-297) -> stage 'asset_gate' decides '-> Layer 2' vs 'PENDING -> asset popup (Layer 2 NOT run)' vs 'VALIDATION-FAIL -> picker'. (7) Layer 2 per-card emit + reflect loop: harness._reflect_loop (:88-181) -> run/layer2_all.run_2_all (:34) -> layer2/build.run_card (emit LLM stage 'l2_emit' layer2/emit/emit.py:209). Grounding is NOT a separate runtime stage: grounding/default_assemble strip/skeleton is used inside the L2 byte-identity gates (layer2/gates.py:110, layer2/build.py:85) and grounding/swap_settle.settle runs as the deterministic swap-collision post-pass (run/layer2_all.py:59 -> stage 'L2.swap_revert'). (8) Executor data fill at the HOST: host/assemble.assemble_cards (server.py:127) -> host/exec_cards._run_cards (:138) / fill_one_card (:105) -> ems_exec/serve/run.run_card or ems_exec/renderers.run_special; fabrication guards = ems_exec/executor/fab_guards.py (last post-fill pass inside fill(); 4 classes: epoch-ms time-leak, null-column-as-reading, no-source value, unstripped seed-leak) -> per-card stage 'exec' ok=True/False (exec_cards.py:183-189). (9) Verdict + serve: host/enrich._enrich_card (:125) computes render|partial|honest_blank via validate/render_verdict.compute (:232), then stage 'RESPONSE' (server.py:130-135) / 'RESPONSE_MULTI' (multi_asset.py:84) and the full response is dumped to outputs/logs/response_<rid>.json (server.py:181-192). Layer 3 is RETIRED (harness.py:6-10).

Run log: obs/stage.py stage(run_id, name, **fields) (:12-20) is THE writer - it prints '[<rid>] <stage>: k=v...' to stderr AND appends outputs/logs/pipeline_<run_id>.jsonl. JSON schema per line is flat: {"ts": <epoch float>, "stage": "<name>", **stage-specific fields} - there is NO 'event', NO 'level', NO uniform 'card_id' field (card id rides as "id" on L2.card and "card" on exec). Stage vocabulary observed across 253 real logs (with their fields): PROMPT{text,asset_id}; 1a{page,primitive,cards,metric,intent,page_key_how,dropped_templates,reroute}; 1b{asset,mfm_id,candidates,basket_cols,how,class_prior,class_mismatch,contract_problems}; layer1a/layer1b{ERROR} (parallel-thunk exceptions, harness:213); degrade{kind,layer}; granularity_reconcile{was,now,cards,has_feeders|ERROR}; validate{verdict,expected_gap_frac|ERROR}; preflight_reroute{gaps,gap_frac,skipped,honest_terminal,reroute_from}; asset_gate{pinned,how,no_data,validation_blocked,verdict,decision}; layer2{cards,conform,partial,gaps,hard_fails,swaps|ERROR}; L2.card{id,swap,to,conforms,fill,answerability,gap,note,keys,endpoint,fail}; L2.swap_revert{id,target,reason|ERROR}; reflect{loop,gaps,hard_fails,gap_frac,honest_terminal,reroute_on,reroute_from,skipped,unresolved}; notes{loop1,loop2,partial,gap}; exec{card,ok,why}; RESPONSE{page,cards,with_payload,frames,rendered,partial,blank,asset_pending,elapsed_ms}; RESPONSE_MULTI{assets,groups,cards,data_unavailable,elapsed_ms}. stage() also fans defect-shaped fields (ERROR=, fail=, ok=False, gap=, gaps>0) out to obs/failures.record (obs/stage.py:25-56, obs/failures.py:9-17) -> outputs/logs/failures_<rid>.jsonl with schema {ts ISO, run_id, stage, card_id, group_id, reason, detail<=300}; reasons include stage_error/card_fail/exec_fail/fill_gap plus llm kinds and per-leaf reason causes. Separately obs/ai_log.py monkeypatches urllib.urlopen to tee every vLLM :8200 request/response into ai_<run_id>.jsonl ({ts,run_id,url,request,response}), and obs/notes.py persists reflect notes to outputs/notes/<rid>.json + a 'notes' stage line. Representative real lines (pipeline_r_1dee11245e / r_66c37cc5bb): {"ts":1783542302.62,"stage":"PROMPT","text":"'fuel efficiency of DG-1'","asset_id":null} / {"stage":"1a","page":"diesel-generator-asset-dashboard/fuel-efficiency","primitive":"grid","cards":3,"metric":"fuel","intent":"snapshot","page_key_how":"verbatim","dropped_templates":[]} / {"stage":"1b","asset":"DG-1 MFM","mfm_id":2,"candidates":0,"basket_cols":29,"how":"AI","class_prior":"DG","class_mismatch":false,"contract_problems":[]} / {"stage":"validate","verdict":"asset_pending","expected_gap_frac":0.0} / {"stage":"asset_gate","pinned":false,"how":"ambiguous","no_data":false,"validation_blocked":false,"verdict":"asset_pending","decision":"PENDING → asset popup (Layer 2 NOT run)"} / {"stage":"layer2","cards":3,"conform":3,"partial":3,"gaps":0,"hard_fails":0,"swaps":0} / {"stage":"L2.card","id":63,"swap":"keep","to":63,"conforms":true,"fill":"live-frontend","answerability":"partial","gap":false,"note":"Showing electrical power state...","keys":["display","snapshot"],"endpoint":"real-time-monitoring","fail":null} / {"stage":"exec","card":63,"ok":true} / {"stage":"notes","loop1":3,"loop2":false,"partial":3,"gap":0} / {"stage":"RESPONSE","page":"diesel-generator-asset-dashboard/fuel-efficiency","cards":3,"with_payload":3,"frames":[],"rendered":3,"partial":1,"blank":0,"asset_pending":false,"elapsed_ms":18568}.

Error signals a harness should grep/classify - IN THE LOG: (a) any line with an "ERROR" field (stage_error; e.g. {"stage":"layer1b","ERROR":"RuntimeError: DB error (target_version1): psql: ... port 5433 failed: Connection refused"}); (b) L2.card "fail" non-null (card_fail) - observed values: "llm_timeout" (and any "llm_<kind>"), "morph rejected: <path>: DATA leaf - morphs are metadata-only...", "reverted to default: <path>", "fields[0] kind=derived without fn", "fields[0] column '<col>' failed pre-L2 data validation (null_rate ...) - leaf honest-blanks", "no default payload + empty exact_metadata"; (c) exec "ok":false with "why":"executor budget exceeded" or "<ExcType>: <msg>" (exec_fail); (d) degrade kind="data_unavailable"; (e) reflect/preflight_reroute gaps>0, hard_fails>0, honest_terminal, skipped=below_min_gap_frac|no_data_asset, unresolved (fill_gap). LLM failures are classified in llm/client.py as timeout|http_<code>|transport|no_json|parse|truncated|over_budget and recorded to failures_<rid>.jsonl with stage="llm" (:68-72); per-stage timeouts are DB knobs llm.timeout.<stage> for stages route/stories/asset_resolve/basket/l2_emit, and llm.no_retry_kinds default 'timeout,truncated' means a timeout NEVER retries. IN THE RESPONSE: card.payload_error = l2.exception OR failure.detail (host/enrich.py:170, served :230) - the fabrication-risk signal; card.render.{verdict,answerability,reason,gaps,leaf_stats{real,data,undeclared}}; card.conforms; card.fill_ok/fill_why + card.frame_status.why; card.data_note + card.l2_answerability (server.py:50-68); top-level ok, errors{layer1a,layer1b,validation,layer2,reroute,preflight_reroute,payload_final}, notes{loop1,loop2}, asset_pending, asset_no_data, validation_blocked, data_unavailable, degrade{kind,layer,detail,reason}. Gate-blank telemetry lives in data_instructions: _honest_blanked (layer2/gates.py:697-698 - proxy/const kills, explicitly telemetry never a card gate), _emit_gaps (cause 'unbound_by_emit', layer2/build.py:286-288), _per_leaf_gaps, _zero_skeleton, _cross_domain/_cross_domain_blanked, _normalized, _noop_morphs. fab_guards + fill blanks ride the payload's GAPS_KEY="_blank_gaps" channel (ems_exec/executor/gaps.py:19) which the host pops into render.gaps as [{slot,cause,metric,column,fn,reason}]; cause vocab observed in failures logs: unbound_by_emit, no_reading, unstripped_seed, column_absent, structurally_null, epoch_ms_leak, derivation_unbound, no_data, no_asset_3d, null_column_reading, no_source_value, quantity_mismatch, swap_dup, data_unavailable. Python tracebacks appear ONLY on host stderr via traceback.print_exc() for /api/run//api/frame//api/assets 500s (server.py:227,293,342) - the wire response is {"ok":false,"error":"<Type>: <msg>"}; layer exceptions are stringified into errors{} + ERROR= stage fields, never tracebacks in the jsonl.

Verdict semantics: computed post-fill at the serve boundary - host/enrich.py:171 calls validate/render_verdict.compute (render_verdict.py:232-272). Universe = declared field leaves + roster_stats + undeclared numeric leaves (scaffold/time-axis keys excluded). Rules: skeleton_blank OR (payload_error AND n_real==0) -> honest_blank (:261-262); n_data==0 -> 'render' if has_payload else honest_blank (:263-264); n_real==0 -> honest_blank; n_real==n_data -> render; else partial. answerability maps render->full, partial->partial, honest_blank->none (:160). GOTCHA CONFIRMED in code and docs: verdict='render' does NOT mean has-data - render_verdict.py:264 verdicts a card with ZERO data leaves (chrome-only, or every leaf scaffold-excluded) as 'render' with n_real=0, and validation/response.py:5 states verbatim '`render.verdict` (render|partial|honest_blank) is OPTIMISTIC - per-leaf truth is `render.leaf_stats` {real,data}'. Also render_verdict.py:19-20 + enrich comments: verdicts are TELEMETRY, never a render gate (per-leaf degradation - the card always mounts its real component). RESPONSE's rendered count = verdict in (render,partial) (server.py:132), so 'rendered' is likewise not a has-data count; the honest has-data signal is leaf_stats.real>0 (or diffing the payload against the card_payloads seed, per the v48 deep-validation harness).

details.l2_failure_envelope: layer2/build.py ~:672 failure = {stage: 'llm'|'emit', reason: 'llm_<kind>'|first failure string, detail: '; '.join(failures[:6])}; conforms=False marks a HARD fail (reflect trigger under default reflect.reroute_on='hard_failure')
details.verdict_rules: validate/render_verdict.py:261-271: skeleton_blank or (payload_error and n_real==0) -> honest_blank; n_data==0 -> render if has_payload else honest_blank; n_real==0 -> honest_blank; n_real==n_data -> render; else partial. answerability: render->full, partial->partial, honest_blank->none

gotchas: verdict='render' does NOT mean has-data: render_verdict.py:263-264 verdicts a zero-data-leaf (chrome-only / all-scaffold) card 'render' with n_real=0; validation/response.py:5 says verbatim 'render.verdict ... is OPTIMISTIC - per-leaf truth is render.leaf_stats {real,data}'. The RESPONSE stage 'rendered' count (server.py:132) inherits this.
The jsonl schema is NOT uniform: no 'event'/'level' keys; card id is 'id' on L2.card lines but 'card' on exec lines; ts is epoch-float in pipeline_*.jsonl but ISO string in failures_*/ai_*.jsonl.
Verdicts are telemetry, never render gates (per-leaf degradation mandate) - a card with verdict=honest_blank still mounts its real CMD_V2 component with nulled leaves.
L2.card 'fail' non-null does NOT always mean conforms=False in older logs; the authoritative HARD-fail signal is conforms=false (reflect triggers only on that under the default policy).
An honest answerability='none' gap (conforms=true, per-leaf reasons) is a VALID TERMINAL - reflect logs honest_terminal=true and keeps the page; do not classify it as a defect.

payload_error can be a stale telemetry mislabel family that was partitioned out (layer2/build.py comments around :503-538): per-leaf field self-heals are di._per_leaf_gaps + data_note, NOT payload_error; only card-structural issues set it now.

failures_<rid>.jsonl is dominated by stage='reason' per-leaf blank-reason records (108k+) mirrored from config/reason_templates.py - filter by stage in ('llm','layer2','layer1b','reflect','L2.card','validate','validation') for real defects.

llm timeouts NEVER retry (llm.no_retry_kinds default 'timeout,truncated') - a retried deterministic failure just doubles the hang; the card degrades to fail='llm_timeout', conforms=false, metadata-frame render.
Python tracebacks only reach host stderr (traceback.print_exc on 500s); the jsonl and response carry stringified '<Type>: <msg>' only.
Multi-asset runs mint per-class run_ids via make_run_id(prompt, salt='class:<cls>') plus a parent rid for RESPONSE_MULTI - one user prompt can produce several pipeline_<rid>.jsonl files.

A single pipeline_<rid>.jsonl can contain MULTIPLE runs of the same prompt (run_id is prompt-derived, files are opened append) - e.g. pipeline_r_1dee11245e.jsonl holds 3 separate PROMPT->RESPONSE sequences; split on PROMPT lines when replaying.
obs/stage.py and obs/failures.py never raise (all writes wrapped in try/except pass) - a full disk or bad field silently drops telemetry, so absence of a line is not proof a stage did not run.

result.summary:
Both DBs are reachable and were queried read-only. Connection wiring lives in /home/rohith/desktop/BFI/backend/layer2/pipeline_v48/config/databases.py: catalog DB `cmd_catalog` at 127.0.0.1:5432 (user postgres, no password) and the live data/registry DB `target_version1` schema `neuract` at 127.0.0.1:5433 (archbox tunnel). Access helpers: data/db_client.py q(db,sql) / pg_connect(db), which route per-db via conn_env().

THE HEADLINE: V48 already contains a working automatic prompt generator — validation/corpus/ (universe.py + templates.py + generate.py + mutate.py). universe() reads cmd_catalog ground truth (registry_lt_mfm 320 assets → 14 name-classes, pcc_panel_alias 28 aliases, page_specs 49 live pages, cards 113, card_handling) and generate() deterministically (seed=48, sha1 case ids) permutes it against templates.py's WORKFLOW TAXONOMY into 940 JSONL cases today, each with an expected outcome for judging: single_asset 400, historical 250, mutated 60, panel_aggregate 56, ambiguous 36, alias 28, narrative 20, compare_2/3/5/mixed 17/13/6/2, knowledge 10, mixed 10, sld 8, view_3d 8, sankey 6, off_domain 6, invalid 4. Class-appropriate metric pairing is encoded in templates.METRICS (e.g. 'fuel efficiency'→DG only, 'thermal oil'→Compressor/Dryer), plus TIME_WINDOWS (8), CONCEPTS (10 knowledge Qs), OFF_DOMAIN (6), INVALID (4). validation/runner.py executes cases against /api/run. A second DB-editable prompt matrix exists: cmd_catalog.render_guarantee_matrix (15 rows: tag, asset_selector like 'name~ups-01&has_data', page_glob, time_window, phrasing template '{page} {a}') + render_guarantee_page_phrase (7 page-seg→NL verb phrase), consumed by tests/test_render_guarantee_50.py via config/prompt_matrix.py. Third corpora: copilot/copilot_index.sqlite entities table (440 question, 325 metric w/ unit, 210 asset, 145 card, 75 page, 12 area, 18 time entities with keywords+popularity) and tools/asset_sweep.py's 9 pinned asset-dashboard prompts (DG-1 id 2, Transformer-01 id 171, GIC-01-N3-UPS-01 id 11).

Ground-truth inventories for generation: (1) cmd_catalog.card_handling — 145 cards, 7 handling classes: single_asset_series 52, single_asset_derived 37, panel_aggregate 24, asset_3d 23, narrative_ai 4, nav_index 3, topology_sld 2; columns card_id/page_key/title/primary_component/handling_class/resolver_scope/payload_family/backend_strategy/data_sources/verified. (2) Pages — routable_pages has exactly the 18 enabled page_keys (4 DG deep-tabs, 4 feeder, 5 panel-overview, 2 transformer, 3 UPS); card_handling spans 53 page_keys (incl. BMS + legacy areas); pages table = 12 legacy areas; page_specs = the live-status page list (49 used by the corpus). (3) Assets — neuract.lt_mfm 320 rows (id, name, table_name, db_link, panel_id, mfm_type_id, role, rated_capacity_kva), types: LT Panel 257 / UPS 34 / APFC 15 / Transformer 14; mirrored locally as cmd_catalog.registry_lt_mfm (+table_exists: 306 wired) so prompt gen never needs the flaky :5433. PCC-Panel-1..4 = mfm ids 317/318/319/320. Confirmed homonyms: Solar Incomer-1 ×4 (ids 17,46,73,107), Solar Incomer-2 ×4 (19,49,75,97), HHF-01/HHF-02 repeated across GIC blocks, Transformer-01..04 duplicated (GIC-15 pair 164-168 vs [Secure Elite300] pair 171-174). (4) Metric vocab — cmd_catalog.app_config JSON rows quantity.name_classes (125 name-token→class entries: voltage/volt, current/amps, power/kw/kva/kvar/demand, energy/kwh/consumption, frequency/hz, temperature/hotspot, lol/lolpct→lifetime …), quantity.unit_classes (49), quantity.semantic_families — seeded by tools/seed_quantity_vocab.py from layer2/quantity_class.py; plus metric_class (page_key→required_class, 14 rows) and derived_metrics (metric_key/label/sql_fragment/unit: active_mwh, vDev, vUnbalance, iUnbalance, secKwhPt …). (5) equipment schema — 22 tables (asset_meter, asset_threshold, bms_meter, bms_meter_limit, breaker, core_assettype, core_paneltype, data_source, equipment, equipment_config, feeder, kitpreview_* ×7, mfm, nameplate, rtm_threshold); equipment.equipment 182 rows keyed by slug (pcc-3b, dg-07, tx-standby, lam-8-1) with core_assettype = 15 classes (grid, dg, ups, solar, bms, chiller, ahu, csu, air_washer, air_washer_exhaust, air_compressor, air_dryer, vacuum_degasser, pressurization_unit, general_air_exhaust); equipment.mfm is the table_name bridge (303 rows wired).

key_files.purpose: Single source of DB wiring: cmd_catalog @127.0.0.1:5432, target_version1/neuract @127.0.0.1:5433 tunnel, conn_env() per-db routing
q(db,sql) psql CSV helper + pg_connect(db) psycopg2 — the read path prompt-gen code should reuse
Ground-truth universe reader: registry_lt_mfm→14 asset classes, unique_names(306)/homonym_tokens(30)/panel_aliases(28)/pages(49)/cards(113)
THE workflow taxonomy: 18 prompt categories with expected outcomes, class-gated METRICS map, TIME_WINDOWS, CONCEPTS, OFF_DOMAIN, INVALID
Deterministic corpus generator (seed=48, sha1 ids) — currently emits 940 cases {id, category, prompt, expect, meta}
Parallel prompt executor: runs corpus cases against /api/run
DB-driven 50-prompt matrix built from cmd_catalog.render_guarantee_matrix × live pages × registry names
9 pinned asset-dashboard prompts (page, prompt, asset_id): DG-1=2, Transformer-01=171, UPS-01=11
Seeds quantity.name_classes/unit_classes/semantic_families into cmd_catalog.app_config from layer2/quantity_class.py
Copilot entity index: 440 questions, 325 metrics(+unit), 210 assets, 145 cards, 75 pages, 12 areas, 18 time entities
LLM-generated starter commands from real asset listing (5 distinct intents: RT/trend/V&I/PQ/alarms)
Code-default quantity vocab dicts (_NAME_CLASSES_DEFAULT 125 keys, _UNIT_CLASSES_DEFAULT 49 keys)

db_connections.cmd_catalog: psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -d cmd_catalog (local, no password) — REACHABLE
db_connections.neuract_data: psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -d target_version1, schema neuract (archbox tunnel) — REACHABLE at query time
db_connections.mirror: cmd_catalog.registry_lt_mfm/registry_lt_mfm_type/registry_asset/... = :5432 mirror of neuract registry (scripts/sync_neuract_registry.py) — use for tunnel-independent prompt gen

sample_rows: Individual-Asset Overview (3D core + phase strip + KPI column)

pages.other_tables: pages = 12 legacy areas (Asset · DG, Panel · Real-Time, ...); page_specs(page_key,status) = live-page list the corpus uses (49); card_handling spans 53 distinct page_keys incl. ~25 BMS pages (bms/chiller/*, bms/air-compressor/*, chiller/condenser, ahu-csu/ahu-overview, ...)

assets.source: neuract.lt_mfm (320 rows) JOIN neuract.lt_mfm_type; local mirror cmd_catalog.registry_lt_mfm adds table_exists (306 wired) + never_wired
sample_assets: 309 GIC-30-N1-11KV Power Transformer Grid Inc [Secure Elite300]

homonyms.Transformer-01..04: duplicated: GIC-15 pair (164,166,167,168) vs [Secure Elite300] pair (171,172,173,174)
homonyms.HHF-01/HHF-02: repeated across GIC-01/02/04/06/07/09 blocks (also norm-key collides per render_guarantee_matrix tag 'ambiguous')

assets.pcc_panel_alias: 28 alias rows: pcc-1a/pcc-1b/pcc-1/pcc-panel-1→mfm 317, pcc-2*→318, pcc-3*→319, pcc-4*→320 (columns alias, pcc_slug, panel_mfm_id, panel_name, section, note)

metric_vocab.home: cmd_catalog.app_config JSON rows: quantity.name_classes (125 keys), quantity.unit_classes (49 keys), quantity.semantic_families — NOT a dedicated table
metric_vocab.metric_class_table: cmd_catalog.metric_class(page_key, required_class): energy-power->power+energy, real-time-monitoring->power+voltage+current, voltage-current->voltage+current, power-quality->thd, harmonics-pq->thd, overview-sld-3d->breaker (14 rows)
metric_vocab.derived_metrics_table: cmd_catalog.derived_metrics(metric_key, label, base_columns, sql_fragment, nameplate_refs, unit, exact, source): active_mwh, reactive_mvarh, apparentMvah, totalEnergyKwh, lossEnergyKwh, secKwhPt, vDev, vUnbalance, iUnbalance ...
metric_vocab.copilot_metrics: copilot_index.sqlite entities type='metric' 325 rows with display+unit: Active Energy Import kWh, Active Power Total kW, Battery Backup %, Battery Temperature degC, Battery Voltage V ...

equipment_schema.equipment_table: 182 rows (id, name, key/slug, distribution_panel, metered, asset_type_id, panel_type_id) — e.g. PCC-3B/pcc-3b, DG-7/dg-07, 20 MVA Tx-Standby/tx-standby, UPS supply Lam-8.1/lam-8-1; asset_type set on only 34 rows (ups 16, dg 8, air_dryer 3, air_compressor 3, solar 1, grid 1, ...)
equipment_schema.mfm_bridge: equipment.mfm (303 rows with table_name) — the table_name-only bridge to neuract gic_* data tables; also carries role, section, zone, rated_capacity_kva, energy_direction, energy/power_scale

prompt_generation_sources.corpus_generator: validation/corpus/generate.py — RUNS TODAY: 940 deterministic cases across 18 categories with expected outcomes (cards|picker|knowledge|refused|empty|compare:N)
prompt_generation_sources.render_guarantee_matrix: cmd_catalog.render_guarantee_matrix 15 tags (ambiguous, apfcr, dg_duplicate, empty_meter, feeder_generic, history_30d/ytd, incomer, pcc_aggregate, populated_feeder, reversed_ct, scada, tm_ups ...) with asset_selector DSL (name~x, class=UPS&has_data, concept:harmonic-filter), page_glob, phrasing '{page} {a}'; + render_guarantee_page_phrase 7 NL phrases
prompt_generation_sources.copilot_questions: copilot_index.sqlite 440 pre-authored NL questions tied to cards (e.g. 'Which feeder, in which section, is running hot right now and on which metric?')
prompt_generation_sources.asset_sweep_9: tools/asset_sweep.py PROMPTS: (page, prompt, pinned mfm_id) for DG-1(2)/Transformer-01(171)/UPS-01(11) across the 9 asset deep-tab pages

gotchas: Page-key spaces are inconsistent: pages.area = 12 legacy display areas ('Asset · DG'), card_handling.page_key = 53 slugs (mixing legacy areas + real slugs), routable_pages = the 18 ENABLED pipeline pages, page_specs status='live' = what the corpus generator uses (49). There is NO page_catalog_cards view in v48 cmd_catalog (that was v47). Pick routable_pages for the 18-page acceptance surface, page_specs for full coverage.

PCC panel ids per live DB: PCC-Panel-1=317, 2=318, 3=319, 4=320 (project memory notes saying 318/319/320/321 are off by one vs current DB). pcc_panel_alias maps pcc-1a/pcc-1/pcc-panel-1 etc. to these ids; PCC-Panel-4 (320) is genuinely data-empty per memory.

validation/corpus/universe.py homonym_tokens is currently degenerate: the unit-token regex matches the 'GIC-N' prefix so all 30 homonym tokens are GIC-1..GIC-30, not real homonyms (Solar Incomer-1 x4, HHF-01/02, Transformer-01 twice). Ambiguity prompt generation should derive homonyms from lt_mfm name suffix grouping (SQL regexp_replace shown works) or fix the regex.

Quantity vocab is NOT a table — it is 3 JSON rows in cmd_catalog.app_config (quantity.name_classes/unit_classes/semantic_families); cfg() REPLACES not merges, so read via app_config, and layer2/quantity_class.py holds the code defaults.

Use cmd_catalog.registry_lt_mfm (:5432 mirror, has table_exists flag; 306/320 wired) for prompt generation instead of neuract.lt_mfm so generation survives :5433 tunnel flaps — this is exactly what validation/corpus/universe.py and test_render_guarantee_50.py already do (name-hint fallback).
equipment.equipment.asset_type_id is NULL on 148/182 rows — class coverage there is partial; the corpus's table-name classifier (_NAME_CLASS in universe.py) is the more complete class signal.

Some assets are deliberate negative-prompt material: GIC-02-N5-UPS-04 (0-row empty meter -> honest blank), AUX-HSD-PLC (SCADA, no electrical columns -> class-gate blank), dg_N_mfm vs empty gic_28_*_jk duplicates — these are encoded as render_guarantee_matrix tags and should stay in any generated corpus.
psql to :5433 does not accept 'SET search_path=...; \d x' in -c; qualify as neuract.lt_mfm or use information_schema.
